name: Panda Express Map
short_description: MP-focused map overhaul: consolidates non-European countries to reduce compute while keeping economies intact; releases all releasable nations and subjects in Europe; splits Iberia and France into many smaller and larger countries for a more balanced multiplayer experience; redistributes gold and silver so each region's dominant country gets one precious metal mine while others do not, preventing any single player from snowballing due to lucky resource placement.
